siri_text: Tuesday's workout. Strength: Deadlift, 4 by 6 at 65 percent. Metcon: Rounds for Time: 800m Run, 40 Wall Balls, 20 T2B, 10 Burpee box overs. For hypertrophy, focus on chest, back (horizontal rows), shoulders.
